title: Yacht Hire Marbella 2026: Costs, Boats and Where to Set Off
html:
Marbella offers some of the finest yacht hire on the Costa del Sol, with departures from Puerto Banús and daily rates starting at around €1,200 for a motor yacht. Whether you want a half-day cruise to Cabo Pino or a full-day island hop, the BoatHire24 platform connects you directly with local owners and professional skippers.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht in Marbella?

Prices for yacht hire in Marbella range from €600 for a shared tour to over €12,000 for a superyacht. A small motorboat for a half-day costs around €350, while a crewed catamaran for a full day with lunch typically starts at €2,500. To compare verified options, you can browse day charters in Marbella that suit different group sizes and budgets. Currency is always quoted in EUR for this destination.

Where to set off in Marbella

The main departure points are Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina, Cabo Pino Marina and the nearby port of La Duquesa. Puerto Banús is the most famous, with superyacht berths and waterfront restaurants. Marbella Marina offers a quieter base close to the old town. Cabo Pino is a small, sheltered harbour popular with family charters, and La Duquesa, 25 minutes south, gives access to the Genal River mouth. For longer trips, motor yachts often head to Benalmádena or even Gibraltar.

Which boat to rent

Your choice depends on group size, duration and whether you want a skipper. Below are the most popular options available through the marketplace.

  1. Rib or small speedboat, ideal for a two-hour coastal blast to Marbella Bay; carries up to 6 guests; from €350 half-day.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Fairline Squadron), best for day charters with 8, 10 guests; from €1,200 half-day. For a specific model, see the Mefasa 90 charter page for a 27-metre flybridge with full crew.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 46), stable and spacious for 10, 12 guests on full-day trips; from €2,500 including lunch.
  4. Luxury superyacht (e.g. Azimut Grande), fully crewed, with jacuzzi and water toys; maximum 12 guests; from €8,000 per day.

What is included in the cost?

Costs typically cover the boat, fuel, crew and insurance; food and drinks are usually extra. Here is the typical price breakdown:

  • Shared tour (sunset cruise): €60, €90 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day: €350, €600 for up to 6 people
  • Catamaran full-day: €2,500, €4,000 for 10, 12 guests, no skipper cost separate
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: €4,500, €12,000 for 8, 12 guests, fully inclusive of crew, fuel and water toys

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For most motor yachts over 15 metres you will need a skipper, but smaller boats without a licence are available. Spanish law requires the Permiso de Navegación for hire boats up to 8 metres, while boats above that power or length require a professional skipper. Charter operators on BoatHire24 will confirm exact requirements for each vessel. The high season runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can create choppy conditions in the afternoon, so many skippers recommend a morning departure.

If you charter a crewed yacht from Puerto Banús in July or August, aim to leave by 9am to avoid the Levante swell and enjoy calmer seas around Cabo Pino.

At a glance

  • Price band: €350 to €12,000 per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 2-hour sunset to full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum capacity without a licence: 6 guests on small motorboats
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I book a boat for a birthday party in Marbella?

Yes, many catamarans and motor yachts welcome up to 12 guests for parties, with catering options available through the owner or a private chef.

Is it safe to rent a yacht in Marbella with a child?

Most crewed yachts provide life jackets and are safe for children, but always confirm child-friendly equipment with the owner before booking.

How far in advance should I book a yacht in Marbella?

For July and August, book at least four weeks ahead; off-peak dates can often be arranged with a week’s notice.

Whether you are planning a family day out or a corporate celebration, the direct booking system on the BoatHire24 marketplace gives you transparent prices and verified owners. If you own a boat in Marbella, you can list it on the same platform and start earning from your asset in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
